case_title: TANAKA, TOMMY vs. VICINI, HOWARD et al

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VICINI, HOWARD

9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT PRESENT IN PRO PER. PLAINTIFF'S CASE - ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. DEFENSE CASE - ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. ORAL EVIDENCE GIVEN ON PLAINTIFF'S REBUTTAL CASE. CAUSE SUBMITTED COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICINI, HOWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 735 O'FARRELL STREET #45, S.F, CA. 94109 $915.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
